notes: No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (only chunk_001 carries them); all candidates are event-text grounded.
Event 0 is part 2/2 of the 10-Q (liquidity/capex/dividends/buybacks/notes/credit-facility MD&A + risk-factor stub); part 1 handled by another bot.

Skipped as vague/period-bound/no causal claim (8): bare 'macroeconomic environment'; 'market instability'; pandemic/in-person dining restriction boilerplate; landlord/tenant economic health; 53rd-week sales-tax timing artifact; G&A line (no narrative attribution); interest and other expense line; IRS uncertain tax positions.
10-Q dividend-resumption and deferred-consideration passages deduped into common_stock_dividend and frc_acquisition_costs (clearer 8-K quotes used).
FRC and North Italia treated as allowed brand/segment names (CAKE-owned concepts), not peer company names.
All 34 evidence quotes programmatically verified as exact substrings of their event's content.
